author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented Weibull (inverse CDF sampling, log_prob, entropy, 3 tests), Pareto Type I (power-law, 3 tests), VonMises (circular normal with Best's rejection sampling, log Bessel I_0 approximation, 3 tests). Gumbel already existed. 266 distribution tests pass, 0 warnings.
